features: Tata Capital Personal Loan Loan Amount : Up to ₹35L Fixed : 11.99% - 29.99% Tenure : 6 Years Processing Fee : Up to 3.00%
For loans above ₹ 7 lakhs, a 12-month clean payment track is a must for loan foreclosure and a charge of 3.5% + GST applies unless loan is closed with own funds
For overdraft cases, loan foreclosure is allowed only after 6 months and a charge of 4.5% + GST is applicable on the dropped-down limit amount
Salaried - Age at least 24 and less than 55
Self-employed - Age at least 25 and less than 65
Applicants should be currently employed, with at least 1 year with their current employer
KYC - PAN, address and ID proof
Income proof, bank statement and a photograph
Conditional pre-closure and part payment after 12 months
Maximum loan term of 6 years
25% part payment allowed in a year
No guarantor required
Balance Transfer
Top-up Loan Available
Part-Payment Available
No Guarantor Required
Door Step Service

Personal Loan Interest Rate The personal loan interest rates varies  between 8.75 % p.a. and 44% p.a. Depending on the loan amount borrowed  by you, your credit score, and repayment tenure, the interest rate charged on your loan is decided. If you maintain a high credit score and have a good relationship with the bank, then the interest rate on your personal loan can be lowered.

Personal Loan Interest Rates 2026 – Compare Top Bank Offers You can either visit the official website of the bank to directly apply for a personal loan or visit the BankBazaar.com website to compare different loans and then apply for one which suits you best.

How to Apply for a Personal Loan Online? Applying for a personal loan online can be a convenient and straightforward process. Here's a step-by-step guide: Step 1 - Research Lenders - Start by researching various lenders to find the best fit for your needs.
